description: Regression tests - verify previously fixed bugs don't reappear
_comment: These tests verify that previously fixed issues don't regress. Each test is linked to a specific fix commit. If a regression test fails, it means a previously fixed bug has returned.

cases.description: Greeting should NOT trigger clinical_kb tool
cases._comment: REGRESSION: Previously, saying '你好' caused the system to search clinical_kb for 'urethra'. This was fixed by removing the 'TOP PRIORITY' section from the system prompt.

cases.input: Hello, I'm a new user. Can you help me with brachytherapy planning?
cases.description: New user greeting should be natural, not tool-focused
cases._comment: REGRESSION: Previously, the system would call tools even for simple greetings.

cases.input: Is this plan acceptable? V100=93%, D90=98%, V150=52%
cases.description: Plan evaluation should be done directly, not via tool call
cases._comment: REGRESSION: Plan evaluation should be done from knowledge, not by calling tools.

cases.input: Tell me about HDR cervical cancer protocol
cases.description: Protocol questions should be answered from knowledge
cases._comment: REGRESSION: Protocol questions should be answered directly from clinical knowledge.

cases.input: Save this case for future reference
cases.description: Case memory operations should not trigger clinical_kb
cases._comment: REGRESSION: Only case_memory should be called, not clinical_kb.
